top_signals.title: Japan’s finance chief pledges bold action for weak yen as needed
top_signals.summary: "We have understanding" from the G7 counterparts, Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama said. "We will take bold action as needed."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
